arguments.goal: Scribe is reliably consulted by other tools when they modify a repo. Measurable via: count of scribe_update calls per session where another tool was the author_tool.
arguments.metric: scribe_update calls from non-cli author_tools per session (target ≥ 1 per session with landed changes)

warnings.detail: Goal has no matching entry in this repo's `.research-md/`, `.visionlog/`, or `.lighthouse/`. Consequential work should be earned via research.md and recorded as an ADR in visionlog before execution begins. If this goal is small/obvious, ignore. If it spawns substantial work, pause and go upstream.

arguments.action_summary: Scribe v0.0.1 built and installed. Three-tool MCP (init/read/update), data-layer only per ADR-001. Registered at user scope; visible as `scribe: ✓ Connected`. Visionlog project initialized with vision + 3 guardrails + ADR-001. Scribe's own card.md synthesized and written — first real scribe_update call, author_tool=hone-session. Measurement reflects: 0 OTHER tools have called scribe yet; the CLI/hone-session doesn't count against the north star metric.
